headline: AT&T Ranked #1 in Customer Satisfaction for Small Business Internet Service by JD Power
summary: AT&T was ranked highest for small business internet customer satisfaction in the JD Power 2026 U.S. Business Internet Satisfaction StudySM, following the company's #1 ranking in Customer Satisfaction in Small Business Wireless Service in the JD Power 2025 U.S. Business Wireless Satisfaction StudySM. Together, these recognitions reflect AT&T's continued focus on delivering what small businesses need: converged connectivity. Small businesses are looking for reliable internet and wireless solutions

headline: Verizon: High Yield And AI Upside Make This Pullback A Strong Buy
summary: Verizon's key drivers include postpaid phone net adds, broadband momentum, Frontier integration, and AI-driven efficiencies. Read why VZ stock is a strong buy.
